title: 6" 2 Sided Knife Blade Sharpener Sharpening Stone (Grit: 120 / 240)
description:
Keep your knives, tools and cutting edges ready for use with the ASR Outdoor 6-Inch Dual Grit Sharpening Stone. Constructed from durable aluminum oxide, this two-sided sharpening stone features a coarse 120 grit surface for restoring dull edges and a finer 240 grit surface for refining and maintaining sharpness. Measuring approximately 6 x 2 x 1 inches, the compact design is easy to carry in tool kits, camping gear, hunting packs and workshop setups. Ideal for sharpening knives, blades and other cutting tools at home or in the field.

ASR Outdoor 6" 2 Sided Knife Blade Sharpener Sharpening Stone (Grit: 120 / 240)
The ASR Outdoor 6-Inch Double-Sided Sharpening Stone is a practical sharpening solution designed to help maintain knives, blades and cutting tools. Made from extra-hard aluminum oxide, this sharpening stone offers dependable performance for restoring and maintaining sharp edges across a variety of tools.

Featuring two grit surfaces, the coarse 120 grit side is ideal for sharpening dull or worn edges, while the finer 240 grit side helps refine the edge and improve cutting performance. The dual-sided design provides versatility for both routine maintenance and more extensive sharpening needs.

Measuring approximately 6 inches long, 2 inches wide and 1 inch thick, the sharpening stone is compact enough for easy transport while providing ample surface area for effective sharpening. Its lightweight design makes it suitable for use in workshops, garages, hunting camps, camping gear and outdoor tool kits.

Whether maintaining pocket knives, hunting knives, utility blades or other cutting tools, this aluminum oxide sharpening stone is an essential addition to any sharpening setup.
Key Features
  • DUAL GRIT SHARPENING SURFACES - Features 120 grit and 240 grit sides for sharpening and refining blade edges
  • DURABLE ALUMINUM OXIDE CONSTRUCTION - Extra-hard material provides long-lasting sharpening performance
  • RESTORES DULL BLADES - Coarse grit surface helps bring worn cutting edges back into working condition
  • COMPACT AND PORTABLE DESIGN - Measures approximately 6 x 2 x 1 inches for easy transport and storage
  • VERSATILE SHARPENING TOOL - Suitable for knives, utility blades and a variety of cutting tools
Specifications
MPN: SS6-154
UPC: 102801259813
Grit Rating: 120/240
Material: Aluminum Oxide
Intended Use: Knife and Blade Sharpening
Restore and maintain sharp cutting edges with the ASR Outdoor Dual Grit Sharpening Stone. Constructed from durable aluminum oxide, this sharpening stone features both coarse and fine grit surfaces to help sharpen, refine and maintain a variety of blades and cutting tools.

The 120 grit side is designed for restoring dull edges, while the 240 grit side helps smooth and finish the sharpening process. Measuring approximately 6 x 2 x 1 inches, the compact stone is easy to store in toolboxes, camping equipment, hunting packs and workshop spaces. A reliable sharpening accessory for knife owners, outdoor enthusiasts and DIY users alike.
